name: CSW Industrials, Inc.
description: CSW Industrials, Inc. is a diversified industrial growth company with industry-leading operations in three segments: Contractor Solutions, Specialized Reliability Solutions, and Engineered Building Solutions. The company manufactures and sells performance-engineered products, including mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) products, specialty lubricants, sealants, and fire protection products. Serving customers across diverse end markets such as HVAC/R, plumbing, general industrial, energy, and construction, CSW Industrials is committed to delivering high-quality, reliable solutions that enhance operational efficiency and safety.
